ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Code representing the subject of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "credit_points" INTEGER /* Number of credit points awarded for the course */,
  "contact_hours" INTEGER /* Weekly contact hours for the course */,
  "subject_type" TEXT /* Type of the subject (e.g., Theory, Lab) */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the course belongs to */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "is_open_for_registration" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is currently open for registration */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "syllabi" (
  "syllabus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each syllabus */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course it belongs to */,
  "syllabus_details" TEXT /* Detailed syllabus information for the course */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the syllabus */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the syllabus was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the syllabus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("syllabus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_syllabi_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the university */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor of the student (if any) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is currently active */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the student record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., enrolled, dropped, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the enrollment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the faculty member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the faculty member teaches */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the faculty member */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the faculty member */,
  "office_phone" TEXT /* Office phone number of the faculty member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the faculty record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the faculty record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty responsible for teaching the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course assigned to the faculty member */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the assignment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_assignments_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has a prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prerequisite record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the prerequisite record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "chair_name" TEXT /* Name of the department chair */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the department record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course schedule */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course for which the schedule is set */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the course is offered */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the course */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the course is taught */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member teaching the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the schedule record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the grade is associated with */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of grade (e.g., Midterm, Final, Project) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the grade in the overall course assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grade record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the grade record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_courses" (
  "external_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external course */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the external course */,
  "credit_points" INTEGER /* Credit points awarded for the external course */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the external course (e.g., another university) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the external course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the external course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the external course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the external course record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the external course record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the feedback is related to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing the feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback comments from the student */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was given */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course material */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the material is associated with */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., textbook, article, video) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path for the material */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the material was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the material record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material accessed */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student accessing the material */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the student accessing the material */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used to access the material */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES course_materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
